original_image_tags: A faded red stamp block with a star, reading "MAILED 3 / MAR 25 1948 P.M. / FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION / U. S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE".
A vertical column of names printed on the bottom left corner, with a checkmark next to "Mr. Hense".

elements.description: Red stamped box in the lower left containing the text 'COMMUNICATIONS SECTION', 'MAILED 3', a star symbol, 'MAR 25 1948 P.M.', and 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION / U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE'.
Vertical stamp on the right side with the text 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' and a date stamp 'MAR 25 9:20 AM '48'.
Horizontal date stamp at the bottom reading '71 APR 7-1948'.

judge.reason: The descriptions quote substantially different verbatim text for the same primary stamp ('MAILED 3 / MAR 25 1948 P.M.' vs. 'COMMUNICATIONS SECTION', 'MAILED 3', etc.) and describe additional visual elements (vertical stamp, horizontal date stamp) that the other description does not mention, indicating a clear factual contradiction on the content of the images.
